title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency
description: Refine an MCP server whose tools are ambiguous and return too much data. Learners cumulatively produce an efficient tool API and evaluation suite through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution.
Write discriminative descriptions, constrained schemas, examples, and side-effect metadata.
Return actionable domain errors without exposing secrets or stack internals.
